name: obsidianify
description: Graphify-style graph intelligence for Obsidian with Codex memory injection.

interface.shortDescription: Inject ranked Obsidian graph memory by project proximity.
interface.longDescription: Obsidianify is Graphify-style graph intelligence for Obsidian. It reads an entire Obsidian vault, mirrors notes and links into a local graph store, ranks the whole graph, selects project-proximate memory, and generates session context packets for Codex and Claude project sessions.
interface.defaultPrompt: Set up Obsidianify for this project.
